subcodes.first_line: A remembrance from Us unto him who hath mentioned his name before the Wronged One in this noble station, that he may rejoice in My remembrance and [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر من لدنا لمن ذکر اسمه لدی المظلوم فی هذا المقام الکریم لیفرح بذکری و
subcodes.subjects: @knowledge; recognition of God, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @suffering and imprisonment, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times
